title: Standard Car Fuses, Assortment Blade Fuse for Auto Car Truck Standard Blade Replacement Kit 2A 3A 5A 7.5A 10A 15A 20A 25A 30A 40A with 1 Storage Case and 1 Fuse Extrator
features: ▶ Material: High quality plastic and aluminum alloy materials, long time to use. Terminals are constructed from tin-plated zinc for corrosion resistance and optimal conductivity, corrosion resistance and best conductivity, rated voltage 32V, transparent shell can quickly check whether the fuse is blown.

▶ Easy Installation: Color-coded with carved amp rating on the top of the housing for quick confident identification, and easy installation, transparent housings for viewing link status and quick detection of a blown fuse. These blade fuses are clearly marked with amperage and color coded.

▶ PACKAGE CONTENT: 55 Pieces in total (5 pcs each size:2A/ 3A/ 5A/ 7.5A/ 10A/ 15A/ 20A/ 25A/ 30A/ 35A/ 40A),different AMP in different color and AMP numbers carved on the fuse for easy recognition. The car fuses assorted can be easily identified by their color-coded plastic housings and the carved amp rating figures on the top.

▶ Easy to Storage: All fuses are packed in a storage box to protect blade fuses,it is easy to carry and use. Storage box has locking snaps that will secure your fuses. These car fuses can protect the vehicle and electronic equipment from short circuit/overload, and effectively protect the circuit to prevent current overload.

▶ Fuse Size: 17.3*9.8*2.3cm/6.8*3.86*0.9inch, with transparent plastic box. Used to replace car fuses. Use practical safety puller, easy to install and replace. Standard fuses with blade-style contacts and a plastic housing that's color-coded by amperage to prevent installation of a mismatched fuse.

▶ Wide Application: This car auto fuses assortment kit is used for most vehicles(Cars, Truck, SUV, ATV, boats, motorcycles, home, industrial applications and so on,UTV, Camper RV, Motorcycles, etc). Support all models, effective protection circuit to prevent current overload. Protect your vehicles from a short circuit and overload.
description: Feature: Short-circuit proof: Heavy-duty series fuse holders and correct fuses can prevent the circuit from overloading under extreme operating conditions or in the event of a short circuit, keeping your car and electrical equipment in a safe state. Suitable for: Car, truck, ATV, UTV, SUV, boat, etc. Add circuit protection for car alarms, GPS, driving recorders, dashboard cameras, VCD players, etc. Standard fuses -- 56Pcs 2Ax5pcs 3Ax5pcs 5Ax5pcs 7.5Ax5pcs 10Ax5pcs 15Ax5pcs 20Ax5pcs 25Ax5pcs 30Ax5pcs 35Ax5pcs 40Ax5 pcs 1* Fuse Extrator What Is a Car Fuse: A car fuse is an electrical component designed to protect other components, equipment and wiring from any damage caused by excessive current. When the circuit is faulty or abnormal, the current will continue to rise, and the increased current may damage some important devices in the circuit. Installation Notes: 1. Disconnect the power supply. 2. Select and remove the fuse (no more than 40 amps) in the car fuse box. The fuse has a constant or switchable power that matches the power requirements of the accessories to be added. 3. Insert the new accessory fuse (no more than 40 amps) into the additional slot. 4. Install Add-A-Circuit with the newly installed fuse, and then return to the fuse box. Reconnect power. Turn on the ignition switch to test whether installation correct.
